name: Marcus Thompson
title: Digital Nomad & Tech Entrepreneur
bio: Marcus has been working remotely for over 7 years, building his SaaS startup while traveling to 60+ countries. He's mastered the art of staying productive across time zones and loves sharing his strategies for maintaining work-life balance as a digital nomad. When he's not coding, you'll find him trying local street food or hunting for the perfect co-working space.
